and if it falls on any planet then pay attention to it. If malefic aspects of planets fall on this
planet, then predict bad results. If the lunar eclipse falls on the cusp of the M.C. then there are
difficulties in enterprise, service and defamation or fall from grace. If the lunar eclipse or solar
eclipse fall on the cusp of the ascendant and malefics afflict it, then interpret bodily illness.
